MODULE: cosmos.integration.external.cli_swarm_provider
FILE: cosmos/integration/external/cli_swarm_provider.py (248 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: CLI Swarm Provider — ExternalProvider wrapping the CLI bridge router.

"Free compute, full citizen. Every CLI speaks to the swarm." - The Collective

Bridges the CLI capability router into Cosmos's provider system:
- Inherits circuit breaker + fault tolerance from ExternalProvider
- Routes queries t

CLASSES:
- CLISwarmProvider(ExternalProvider): ExternalProvider that routes queries through CLI bridges.

Supports:
- chat() fo
  Methods: async def connect(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def sync(self)
  Methods: async def execute_action(self, action: str, params: Dict[str, Any]) -> Any
  Methods: async def chat(self, prompt: str, system: Optional[str]=None, context: Optional[str]=None, model: Op
  Methods: async def search(self, query: str) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def code_task(self, task: str, context: Optional[str]=None) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def swarm_respond(self, other_bots: List[str], last_speaker: str, last_content: str, chat_hist

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_cli_swarm_provider(preferred_cli: Optional[str]=None) -> CLISwarmProvider
